auth.registerSubtitle: Free and ready in a few seconds
auth.name: Name
auth.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters.
auth.checkEmailFormat: Check your email format and password length.
auth.networkError: Can't reach the server. Please try again later.
auth.emailTaken: This email is already in use.

settings.hapticsDesc: Gentle tactile feedback for selections, toggles, navigation, and saving entries.
settings.hapticsOff: Off for now. You can turn it on anytime
settings.hapticsUnavailable: Not available in this browser or on this device
settings.dataDesc: Under the EU Regulation 2016/679, you have the right to manage your consent, obtain and delete your data at any time.
settings.dangerWarning: This is irreversible. All records will be deleted.
settings.downloadFail: Failed to download data. Please try again later.
settings.deleteFail: Failed to delete account. Please contact support.
settings.deleteStep1Text: All your records, forecasts, and data will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
settings.deleteStep2Text: Type the following word to confirm:
settings.importDesc: Upload a CSV from Daylio or a previously exported Moodscape CSV.
settings.importFormats: Daylio CSV and Moodscape CSV are supported.
settings.importOverwrite: Overwrite records if the date already exists
settings.importHint: Import creates or updates records by date. If several rows land on the same day, the last imported row wins.
settings.importDaylioEnergyHint: Daylio does not export energy: new records use neutral energy 3, and overwriting keeps the existing energy value.
settings.importEmptyFile: The CSV file is empty or has no records.
settings.importUnsupportedFormat: The CSV format could not be recognized. Use a Daylio or Moodscape export.
settings.importInvalidRow: Could not parse row {row}. Check the date, time, and mood values.
settings.importResult: Import finished: added {imported}, updated {updated}, skipped {skipped} out of {total}.

footer.tagline: Your personal mood diary with AI analytics

welcome.selectorText: Choose your mood and energy now. Right after sign up, we will use them for your first entry.
welcome.registerSummaryText: After sign up, we will start your diary with these values.

dashboard.logicalDayHint: After midnight, logging still belongs to {date} until 04:00.
dashboard.recordPromptSubtitle: Log how you feel today and add details if you want.
dashboard.recordSummarySubtitle: Today's entry is saved. You can still adjust it if needed.
dashboard.recordSummaryNote: If your mood changes later, you can update this entry.
dashboard.tagsTitle: What have you been up to?

history.emptySub: Add your first record on the main screen

prediction.consentRequiredText: Personalized AI forecasts require your consent to process analytics data.
prediction.pageSub: A short forecast for tomorrow based on your data.
prediction.moodRiseSub: A slightly lighter emotional tone looks possible.
prediction.moodDropSub: A slightly heavier emotional tone looks possible.
prediction.moodStableSub: No clear mood shift stands out right now.
prediction.energyRiseSub: A bit more energy may be possible.
prediction.energyStableSub: No clear energy shift stands out right now.
prediction.energyPendingSub: There is not enough personal data yet for a separate energy trend estimate.
prediction.heroSubColdRise: Personal history is still limited, so this is a broad forecast for the next few days.
prediction.heroSubColdDrop: Personal history is still limited, so this is a broad forecast for the next few days.
prediction.heroSubColdStable: Personal history is still limited, so this is a broad forecast based on many users.
prediction.heroSubWarm: Below are the most likely scenarios for mood and energy.
prediction.heroSubWarmWithCount: There are {count} personal records in the model now. Below are the most likely scenarios.
prediction.modelInsightCold: With limited personal history, the model stays cautious and shows a broader mood forecast instead of a precise personal readout.
prediction.modelInsightColdWithCount: There are {count} personal records right now. That is enough for an early forecast, but it does not reflect your individual patterns yet.
prediction.modelInsightWarm: As your history grows, the forecast leans more on your own patterns, but it still remains only an estimate.
prediction.modelInsightWarmWithCount: There are {count} personal records right now. The forecast already relies more on your own rhythm.
prediction.modelHintCold: Read this as a likely direction, not as an exact outcome.
prediction.modelHintWarm: Even a personal forecast is not a guarantee. It is more useful to read the trend and compare it with your own experience.
prediction.locationRequiredText: To include weather in the forecast, choose a city manually or enable auto-detection.
prediction.infoText: We do not predict an exact state. We compare three possible directions: rise, stable, or drop.
prediction.infoCold: ❄️ With limited data, we first show a forecast for the next few days based on other users.
prediction.infoWarm: ✨ Once there is enough history, the forecast leans more on your personal rhythm.
prediction.weatherRainDetail: Rain or damp weather is expected.
prediction.weatherSnowDetail: Snow or wintry weather is expected.
prediction.weatherCloudyDetail: It will probably be more overcast and subdued.
prediction.weatherClearDetail: The day will likely feel brighter and clearer.
prediction.weatherEffectCalm: Weather can affect wellbeing for some people.
prediction.weatherEffectActive: Weather can affect wellbeing for some people.
prediction.weatherUnavailableText: The weather service did not return data for this forecast.
prediction.weatherMissingLocationText: Select a city manually or allow geolocation so the forecast can include weather.
prediction.weatherMissingApiKeyText: The weather provider is not configured on the server, so the forecast was calculated without weather context.
prediction.weatherApiErrorText: The weather provider could not be reached. The forecast was calculated without fresh weather data.
prediction.stepRecordsText: We look at your recent mood and energy records to spot repeating patterns.
prediction.stepWeatherText: Weather is added as extra context, but it does not explain everything by itself.
prediction.stepModelText: The AI identifies likely directions for mood and energy.
prediction.forecastDisclaimer: This is only a rough forecast, not an exact outcome.

sleep.title: Today's Sleep
sleep.promptSubtitle: Log how much you slept and how it felt. We'll use it only in analytics for this day.
sleep.summarySubtitle: Sleep saved for today. You can still adjust it if needed.
sleep.emptyMonth: No sleep logs for this month yet
sleep.summaryNote: We'll compare this with your mood and energy later today.

statistics.title: Statistics
statistics.emptySub: Add your first mood record to see statistics
statistics.moodCounterInfo: Mood frequency over the period. The larger the segment, the more often you felt that way.
statistics.moodTrendInfo: Your mood trend. Each point is your entry. Helps you see the big picture.
statistics.energyTrendInfo: Your daily energy levels. Helps you track periods of fatigue and recovery.
statistics.moodEnergyRadarInfo: Average stats by weekday. Shows which days you usually feel best.
statistics.sleepImpactInfo: The link between your sleep and well-being. Shows how sleep quality and duration affect your mood and energy levels.
statistics.moodStabilityInfo: Mood stability index. Shows how smoothly your condition changes day to day. Fewer fluctuations mean a lower score and stabler mood.
statistics.activityImpactInfo: Impact of your activities. Shows the difference between your average mood on days with this activity and days without it.
statistics.sleepImpactEmpty: Log sleep in the morning and mood or energy later the same day to unlock this section.
statistics.activityImpactNeedsData: Track repeated activities for a few more days to compare days with them against days without them.
statistics.sleepImpactSubtitleAllTime: {count} paired days across all history with both sleep and mood/energy logs
statistics.sleepImpactNeedMoreDays: A few more paired days are needed.
statistics.sleepHoursTrendInfo: How many hours you slept each day. Helps you spot patterns in sleep duration.
statistics.sleepQualityTrendInfo: How your sleep quality changed over time. Helps you track good and bad sleep days.
statistics.sleepTrendEmpty: No sleep logs in the selected period yet.

gdpr.title: Privacy & Data Processing Consent
gdpr.description: To provide you with personalized mood forecasts and a secure experience, we need your consent to process your data in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).
gdpr.essentialDesc: Required for authentication, security, and basic app functionality. Cannot be disabled.
gdpr.analyticsDesc: Allows us to process your mood, energy, and geolocation data to train your personal AI model and generate custom forecasts.
gdpr.rights: You have the right to access, modify, or delete your data at any time in the Settings menu.

location.promptText: For smart mood and energy forecasts, we need weather in your city. Detect your city automatically or choose from the list.
location.gpsError: Failed to detect location. Try entering your city manually.
